label: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (Exam SAP-C02)
description: Prepare for the AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional exam SAP-C02 with expert-level study notes focused on advanced, hands-on enterprise architecture. This course emphasizes multi-account governance, AWS Control Tower, Transit Gateway with Direct Connect, active-active multi-region disaster recovery, AWS DMS migration labs, exact IAM JSON policies, cross-account trust, and 2026 cost-optimization strategies through scenario-based practice and architecture decision frameworks.
